caption: A man wearing a red traditional cap and a black patterned garment is shown speaking in a split-screen broadcast. To his right, a second man in a light blue traditional outfit and a matching cap is seen speaking behind a wooden podium. The background behind the second man includes a green banner with the letters "UB" visible. Overlaid on the screen is a purple and white logo that reads "plustv." A purple banner across the bottom contains the text "PLUS POLITICS" and the headline "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." Below this, a white bar contains the text "WATCH ONLINE" and the URL "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV" or "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE," alongside a "SUBSCRIBE" button. As the scene progresses, the man in the red cap continues to speak with varying facial expressions, while the man at the podium remains in a similar posture.
